Package sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph

Class GraphUtils

java.lang.Object
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph.GraphUtils
public class GraphUtils extends Object
Utilities for Graph handling.
Author:
Tiago Ferreira

      @Deprecated public static Tree createTree(org.jgrapht.Graph<SWCPoint,?> graph)

      Creates a Tree from a graph.
      Parameters:
      graph - the graph to be converted.
      Returns:
      the Tree, assembled from the graph vertices

    • show

      public static Window show(DirectedWeightedGraph graph)
      Displays a graph in SNT's "Dendrogram Viewer" featuring UI commands for interactive visualization and export options.
      Parameters:
      graph - the graph to be displayed
      Returns:
      the assembled window
